subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companion! If thou didst but know the measure of my occupations, thou wouldst surely be content with but a single word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق روحانی اگر بدانی که مشغولیت بچه درجه است البته بیک کلمه کفایت فرماای
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort
